/usr/bin/aarch64-linux-gnu-g++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/run_yolo.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/run_yolo.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o run_yolo  -Wl,-rpath,/home/badgerbots/BumperDetection/build libBumperDetection.so /usr/lib/libopencv_highgui.so.4.13.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_videoio.so.4.13.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_video.so.4.13.0 -lleptonica -ltesseract -larchive -lcurl /usr/lib/libopencv_imgcodecs.so.4.13.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_dnn.so.4.13.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_calib3d.so.4.13.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_features2d.so.4.13.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.13.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_flann.so.4.13.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_core.so.4.13.0 -lrknnrt
